Class BaseAttackService

java.lang.Object
util.passwordCracker.services.BaseAttackService
All Implemented Interfaces:
AttackService
Direct Known Subclasses:
BruteAttackService, DicAttackService
public abstract class BaseAttackService extends Object implements AttackService
Base class for password attack services.

This class provides shared functionality for different password cracking strategies such as brute-force and dictionary attacks.

  • Constructor Details

    • BaseAttackService

      public BaseAttackService(String targetHash, String algorithm, AttackListener listener)
      Creates a base attack service instance.
      Parameters:
      targetHash - the hash to crack
      algorithm - the hashing algorithm used
      listener - callback listener for attack events

  • Method Details

    • pause

      public void pause()
      Pauses the attack process.
      Specified by:
      pause in interface AttackService

      public void resume()

    • stop

      public void stop()
      Stops the attack process.

    • runOnFx

      protected void runOnFx(Runnable task)
      Executes a task on the JavaFX application thread.

      If JavaFX is unavailable, the task runs directly.

      Parameters:
      task - the UI task to execute
